zh.Cole Orton, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville於1424年出生。她於1457年與Sir Thomas Fenton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1515年享年91歲。

zh-hans.Cole Orton, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville于1424年出生。她于1457年与Sir Thomas Fenton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1515年享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Name borne in classical mythology by a queen of Sparta, who was ravished by Zeus in the shape of a swan. She gave birth to two eggs which, when hatched, revealed the two sets of twins: Castor and Pollux, and Helen and Hermione.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Elinor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville was born in 1424. She married Sir Thomas Fenton in 1457, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1515, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville est née en 1424. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Fenton en 1457, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1515, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville wurde 1424 geboren. Sie hat 1457 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Fenton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 91 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville è nata il nel 1424. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Fenton nel 1457, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1515, all'età di 91 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville(은)는 1424년 태어났다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir Thomas Fenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville nasceu em 1424. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Fenton em 1457, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1515, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville родилась в 1424 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Fenton в 1457 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1515 г. в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Neville nació en 1424. Se casó con Sir Thomas Fenton en 1457, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1515, a la edad de 91 años.
